item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
json='longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json'
printf 'actual_keys='
jq -c 'keys | sort' \""'$json"
printf '"'expected_keys='
printf '%s\\n' '[\"max_parallel\",\"mode\",\"owner\",\"queues\",\"schema_version\"]'
jq -e '(keys | sort) == ([\"max_parallel\", \"mode\", \"owner\", \"queues\", \"schema_version\"] | sort)' \""'$json" >/dev/null
printf '"'CFG-007 PASS: exact key set; no missing or unexpected fields\\n'"
